name: Mortal Hunter
description: Une silhouette mort-vivante portant un long manteau de cuir, au regard scrutateur et à la cruauté désinvolte.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: Quand le Chasseur réussit une attaque, tous les PJ à Portée Loin perdent un Espoir et vous gagnez une Peur.

features.name: Deathlock
features.description: Maudissez une cible à Portée Très Proche d’un Verrou Mortel nécrotique jusqu’à la fin de la scène. Les attaques du Chasseur contre une cible sous Verrou Mortel infligent des dégâts directs. Le Chasseur ne peut maintenir qu’un seul Verrou Mortel à la fois.

features.name: Inevitable Death
features.description: Placez sous le projecteur 1d4 alliés. Les attaques qu’ils effectuent ainsi infligent la moitié des dégâts.

features.name: Rampage
features.description: Compte à rebours (Boucle 1d6). Quand le Chasseur est sous le projecteur pour la première fois, activez le compte à rebours. Quand il se déclenche, déplacez le Chasseur en ligne droite vers un point à Portée Loin et faites une attaque contre toutes les cibles sur son passage. Les cibles touchées subissent 2d8+2 dégâts physiques.
features.trigger: Quand le chasseur est sous le projecteur pour la première fois

name: Mother
description: The Mother of the Hive, she seeks materials and subjects to

features.name: Surgical Accuracy
features.description: Before Mother makes an attack, roll a d6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target’s Evasion is halved against the attack.

features.name: To Me, My Children!
features.description: Mark a Stressto spotlight1d4+1allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

features.name: Sweeping Incision
features.description: Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Close range. On a success, Mother deals2d6+10physical damage.

features.name: Acidic Mist
features.description: When Mother marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, a cloud of caustic mist emits from her abdomen and all PCs within Very Close range mark an Armor Slot.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When Mother makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Muscle
description: A humanoid made entirely of muscle.

features.name: Muscle Memory
features.description: The Muscle has advantage on attack rolls made against targets they have already dealt damage to.

features.name: Tense Up
features.description: When an attacker makes an attack against the Muscle from Close range or further, you can mark a Stress to increase the Muscle's Difficulty by 2.
features.trigger: When an attacker makes an attack against the Muscle from Close range or further

features.name: Reflex
features.description: When an attack from Melee range misses, deal 2d104-2 physical damage to the attacker. Jaegers are soulless bipedal monstrosities created by mortals through dark experiments to be efficient hunters. Jaeger Assassin Assassins hunt based on scent and are Jaeger Magehunter Magehunters have long tendrils extending from their mouths which they use to feel disturbances in the flow of mana and track magic users. They can wrap these tendrils around the throat of their victim to suffocate extraordinarily dexterous, dropping down to all fours to run and leap towards their targets.

name: Nalusa Falaya, Shadow-Bent
description: A Choctaw shadow that bends like smoke and speaks in the voice you use inside your head.

features.name: Lay the Shadow
features.description: Cast a living shadow that tethers between you and a target within Close. While the tether persists, that target has disadvantage on Presence and Instinct rolls and marks 1 Stress if they move through bright light. The tether ends if you mark HP.

features.name: Bad Thoughts
features.description: The first time each PC indulges in cruel mockery or mean-spirited sabotage, increase this adversary's Difficulty by +2 until end of scene.

features.name: Hide in Another
features.description: When targeted by an attack beyond Very Close, mark a Stress to become a shifting stain on a creature within Close until your next turn. While attached, you can't be targeted; the host is Vulnerable.

name: Narwhal
description: A whale with a horned head.

features.name: Echolocation
features.description: Mark a Stress to emit a sonar pulse and learn the location of all creatures within Far range. All targets within Very Close range must mark 1d4 Stress.

features.name: Skewer
features.description: Spend a Fear to move to Close range and make a standard attack against a target. On a success, deal 2d 10 direct physical damage, and the target is Impaled on the Narwhal's horn. An Impaled target moves with the Narwhal and is Restrained and Vulnerable until they free themselves with a successful Strength or Finesse Roll. Up to two creatures can be Impaled, and the most recent target must free themselves first. Swarm of Piranhas Piranhas are freshwater fish with razor sharp teeth, found in rivers and lakes.

name: Necromancer
description: An aspiring tyrant who has embraced the power of death. Wearing a mantle of flesh and melted wax, they carry a staff with twisted branches and wear a cloak of shadow.

features.name: Pain is an Illusion
features.description: The Necromancer has resistance to physical damage.

features.name: Dance Until they’re Dead
features.description: Spend a Fearto activate1d4allies within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted this way deal half damage.

features.name: Leech Vitality
features.description: Once per scene,spend 2 Fearto force all targets within Close range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Each target that fails marks a HP. Clear a HP for each HP marked by targets.

features.name: Inhuman Shield
features.description: When the Necromancer would take damage,mark a Stressand pick an ally within Very Close range to take the damage instead. NEcromancer
features.trigger: When the Necromancer would take damage

name: Nightmare Hag
description: An elderly crone that hunts at night to haunt the dreams of their victims.

features.name: Coven
features.description: Increase the Hag's Difficulty by 1 for each Hag within Far range.

features.name: Moonbeam
features.description: Mark a Stress to create a pillar of light centered on a target within Far range, or move an existing beam to a new target within range. The target must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or take 2d8 magic damage and become Vulnerable while within the beam.

features.name: Sleep
features.description: Mark a Stress to force a target within Far range to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target falls Asleep until they take damage or the end of the scene. While Asleep a PC can't be spotlighted.

features.name: Haunt Nightmares
features.description: Spend a Fear to manipulate the dreams of all Asleep PCs within Far range. Targets must mark 1d4 Stress and make an Instinct Reaction Roll to wake. On a failure, the target Woods Witch Woods Witches live in the wilds and have abilities granting control over the flora and fauna. A Woods Witch is also a potions and poisons expert who extracts ingredients from the surrounding environment.

features.name: Launch Ally
features.description: When the Ogre reloads, you can choose to load an ally of the Ogre within Very Close range into the cannon instead of ammunition. Oozes Oozes are sentient slimes that are slow moving and colored based on the material that makes up their body. Blood Ooze A Blood Ooze is formed from blood and is typically deep red in color, but can be other colors such as blue if formed from crustacean blood.
features.trigger: When the Ogre reloads

name: Ooze Cube
description: A quivering cube of slime as tall as a giant, transparent but deadly. In its form are bits of broken weapons, coins, and a partially digested skeleton.

features.name: Inching Ooze
features.description: The Cube can only move within Very Close range as their normal movement.

features.name: Transparent
features.description: Before they make their first attack in a fight or after they becomeHidden, the Cube is indistinguishable from the landscape around it until they next act or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll to identify it.

features.name: Engulf!

Whenever the Cube takes the spotlight, all targets it hasEngulfedtake2d10 direct magic damage and must mark an armor slot without receiving its benefits. features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Orc Grunts within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Very Close range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage. Orc Grunt Grunts are frontline warriors who fight fiercely and passionately. Orc Nemesis A Nemesis takes personal offense to the actions of others and makes it their mission to see them fail. Orc Veteran Veterans are wheelchair-bound Orcs (or who have another walking aid, such as robotic legs) who are still eager for a fight.

features.description: The Veteran rolls a critical success on an attack roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Wheelchair Ram
features.description: Mark a Stress and make an attack against a target in Melee range. On a success, deal 2dlO physical damage to the target.

description: A lanky hunched creature with long arms that vaguely resembles a humanoid. It has pale skin, a lamprey mouth and no eyes.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Pale Lurker can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Speak in Memories
features.description: The Pale Lurker speaks telepathically using images and memories.

features.description: Make a standard attack. On a success, the target is Restrained until they make a Strength Roll.

features.name: Command the Thralls
features.description: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

On a failure the target takes 3d10+4 direct physical damage and falls Unconscious (even if they mark their last HP), cannot speak or make action rolls, and starts a Feeding Countdown (4). While this countdown is active, the Pale Lurker is Vulnerable. When it triggers, the target chooses 1 of their experiences and removes it. If the target is no longer Restrained a PC can attempt to rouse the Unconscious target.

features.name: Discarded Body
features.description: Mark a Stress and choose an ally within Far range that marks all its remaining HP and explodes with magical energy. All targets within Very Close range of the ally make an Instinct Reaction Roll (12). Targets who fail take 3d8 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. Author’s Note: This adversary is useful for strange encounters near a city or village. The Pale Lurker can control its thralls to bring others back to its lair through trickery. You can use standards, bruisers and skulks alongside the Pale Lurker, but remove their experiences and apply them to the Pale Lurker instead.

name: Phantom
description: A dark, ghostly humanoid with floating white hair that can take the form of an upcoming threat.

features.name: Ghost

features.name: Probe Weaknesses

name: Plurodin
description: A highly intelligent, human-sized amphibian with multiple dextrous appendages and folds of skin which act as pockets.

features.description: The Plurodin can be spotlighted up to 2 times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Chugalug

features.description: When the Plurodin takes Major damage, one of the potion vials tucked in its skin pockets breaks. Roll a d12. The Plurodin is affected by the potion based on a table (Minor Health Potion clears 1 HP, Minor Stamina Potion clears 1 Stress, Stride Potion allows Far movement, Bolster Potion adds extra die, Control Potion gives +1 Difficulty, Attune Potion gives Opportunity Attack Reaction, Charm Potion clears a condition). Once all instances of a potion have been used, that result becomes null going forward.
features.trigger: takes Major damage

name: Polevik
description: A grim guardian of sunlit fields, the Polevik strikes down the careless and the proud. Cloaked in dust and chaff, he emerges at noon to punish those who disrespect the labor of the land.

features.name: Just a Clump of Dirt
features.description: When Hidden, the Polevik is indistinguishable from dry soil, roots, or chaff around them until they next act or are identified by a successful Instinct roll while in natural terrain.

features.name: Grab and Drag
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, spend a Fear to pull them into Melee range, deal 2d6+3 physical damage, and Restrain them until the Polevik takes Severe damage.

features.name: Reap and Scatter
features.description: Mark a Stress to make a Scythe attack against all targets within Very Close Range. Targets damaged by this attack are knocked back to Close range and must mark an Armor Slot after taking damage. If they can't, they must mark an additional Hit Point.

name: Profane Disciple
description: One of the disciples of Evelyar, betrayed by the clergy and

features.name: Dance of Condemnation
features.description: When the Disciple is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Disciple is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: When Evelyar takes damage from an attack within Very Close range of the Disciple,mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.

name: Puppetmaster Hag
description: A tall faerie with massive claws and multiple smaller arms used to control the strings of her minions.

features.description: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, the target is temporarily Restrained and flying targets become grounded.

features.description: Mark a Stress to extend the Quobble's Boggy Wake out to Very Close range of the Quobble when it moves this turn. Targets moving through this wake must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (16) to avoid sinking into the mud.

features.description: Spend a Fear to make all Engulfed creatures within Close range sink 1d4 feet further into the mud. Ribbets Ribbets are frog-like humanoids. name: Rotting Mummy

name: Satyr
description: A faun with musical talents that enjoys revelry.

features.name: Reveler
features.description: The Satyr has advantage on reaction rolls against being drunk.

features.name: Spit Acid
features.description: Mark a Stress and make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+2 physical damage and the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP and you gain a Fear. Scourged A person experiencing intensely strong emotions can manifest emotional spirits called Scourge Spirits that torment them and inflame their emotions. These ghostly spirits emerge from and surround the person they torment. Anger Scourged Those overcome by stress or hold intense anger from being wronged become Anger Scourged.

name: Scrapper
description: A scuttling machine with robotic arm attachments to break up and manipulate the environment.

features.name: Slag Trail
features.description: The Scrapper leaves a trail of burning slag behind them when they move. Creatures moving through the slag take 2d6 direct magic damage.

features.name: Molten Metal
features.description: Mark a Stress to force all targets within Very Close range in front of the Scrapper to make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8 magic damage.

features.name: Harvest Metal
features.description: Three times per scene, when the Scrapper moves over loose metal, consume them to clear a HP or a Stress. Towerback Towerbacks are built to transport ancient arcane towers. They have been transformed by the remnant magic of the tower, and are much more intelligent than typical Machines.

name: Seadragon
description: An aquatic dragon with shimmering scales.

features.name: Charge
features.description: Mark a Stress to move to Far range and make a standard attack with advantage against a target. On a success, the target takes 2d8+5 physical damage and must mark a Stress.

features.name: Acid Cloud
features.description: Spend a Fear to cover an area within Close range in front of the Seadragon in a cloud of acid. All targets within the area must mark an Armor Slot. If a target can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark a HP.

name: Secret-Keeper
description: Un chef clandestin en contact direct avec les Dieux Déchus.

features.name: Seize Your Moment
features.description: Placez sous le projecteur 1d4 alliés. Les attaques qu’ils effectuent ainsi infligent la moitié des dégâts.

features.name: Our Master's Will
features.description: Quand vous placez sous le projecteur un allié à Portée Loin, gagnez une Peur.
features.trigger: Quand vous placez sous le projecteur un allié à portée loin, gagnez une peur

features.name: Summoning Ritual
features.description: Compte à rebours (6). Quand le Gardien des Secrets est sous le projecteur pour la première fois, activez le compte à rebours. Quand il coche des PV, décomptez ce compte à rebours du nombre de PV cochés. Quand il se déclenche, invoquez un Démon Mineur qui apparaît à Portée Proche.
features.trigger: Quand le gardien des secrets est sous le projecteur pour la première fois

features.name: Fallen Hounds
features.description: Une fois par scène, quand le Gardien des Secrets coche 2 PV ou plus, invoquez une Meute de Chiens Démoniaques, qui apparaît à Portée Proche et est immédiatement mise sous le projecteur.
features.trigger: Quand le gardien des secrets coche 2 pv ou plus

name: Shadow Hag
description: A fey creature that wields shadows and secrets

features.name: Fey Disguise
features.description: The Hag can take on the appearance of a creature similar in size to them. This disguise can be seen through on an Instinct Roll. On a success, the Hag cannot use their “Waking Nightmare” against that PC. On a failure, the PC has disadvantage on all action rolls against the Hag.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Hag can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Raking Claws
features.description: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Hag succeeds against take 2d10 magic damage and knocked back to Close range.

features.name: Waking Nightmare
features.description: Spend a Fear to force all targets within Far range to make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. All targets that fail, lose a Hope and mark a Stress as they relive a childhood nightmare. As long as one target fails, the Hag learns about this nightmare which they use to clear 1 HP and 1 Stress.

features.name: Prey on Terror
features.description: Mark a Stress and choose a point within Far range to place a Nightmare Totem. All creatures within Close range of the Nightmare Totem whose nightmares are known to the Hag are Vulnerable.

features.name: Ethereal Shift
features.description: If the Hag marks HP, mark a Stress to teleport to a location within Close range and gain resistance to physical damage until the next time the Hag has the spotlight. Author’s Note: It’s recommended to run this adversary after the party has gone through a smaller fight, a traversal environment (like the Mist-Filled Swamp) and a social encounter that is bizarre. Themes of childhood and nightmares are important to help this adversary land properly.
features.trigger: If the Hag marks HP

name: Shambling Mummy
description: A decrepit bandage wrapped Mummy that moves slowly

features.name: Minion ()
features.description: The mummy is defeated when they take any damage. For everydamage a PC deals to this adversary, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fearto choose a target and spotlight all adversaries with this name within a certain range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they dealdamage each. Combine this damage.

name: Shark
description: Un grand prédateur aquatique, toujours en mouvement.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: Quand le Requin réussit une attaque, tous les PJ à Portée Loin perdent un Espoir et vous gagnez une Peur.

features.name: Rending Bite
features.description: Quand le Requin réussit une attaque, la cible doit cocher un Emplacement d’armure sans en recevoir les bénéfices. Si elle ne peut pas cocher d’Emplacement d’armure, elle doit cocher un PV supplémentaire.

features.name: Blood in the Water
features.description: Quand une créature à Portée Proche du Requin coche des PV suite à l’attaque d’une autre créature, placez immédiatement le Requin sous le projecteur, en le déplaçant à Portée de Mêlée de la cible et en faisant une attaque standard.

name: Simiah Bronzeback
description: A small and nimble simiah with a bronzed fur patch on their back.

features.name: Climber
features.description: The Simiah climbs just as easily as they run.

features.name: Monkey See, Monkey Do
features.description: Mark a Stress to use the same spell or ability as a PC that the Simiah took the spotlight from. When relevant, spend or gain Fear instead of Hope. Simiah Silverback Silverbacks are tough fighters who lead the defense of Simiah villages from threats. Simiah Goldback Goldbacks are village elders who organize events such as jungle races as a civilized means of settling rivalries between Simiahs.

name: Simiah Goldback
description: An elderly simiah with a golden fur patch on their back.

features.name: Chest Beat
features.description: Mark a Stress to summon 1d4 Simiah Bronzebacks or a Simiah Silverback.

features.name: King of the Jungle
features.description: Spend a Fear to increase in size until the end of the scene. The Simiah gains a HP and they roll an extra die when they deal damage. The Simiah can take the spotlight a second time this GM turn.

features.name: Forest Control
features.description: Spend a Fear to pull down a tree within Close range. A creature hit by the tree must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (15) or take ldlO+5 physical damage.

features.name: Concussive Blow
features.description: When the Simiah makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to knock the target back to Far range. Skeletons Skeletons are collections of bones brought to life, with the bones assembling back into their original positions and held in place by magic. Fossil Fossils are the animated skeletal remains of an ancient beast. Some Fossils missing part of their skeleton might have handicaps such as reduced HP or attack bonus.
features.trigger: When the Simiah makes a successful standard attack

name: Simiah Silverback
description: A muscular simiah with a silvery fur patch on their back.

features.name: Beastly Power
features.description: When you initially roll damage, if you roll the maximum value on a die, also roll a new die of that type and add it to the total.

features.name: Ground Pound
features.description: All targets within Very Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or fall down, becoming Vulnerable until they next act.

features.name: Go Ape
features.description: Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Simiah succeeds against take 2d12 physical damage and are knocked back to Close range.

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: When the Simiah takes damage from an attack within Very Close range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
features.trigger: When the Simiah takes damage from an attack within Very Close range

name: Siren
description: Une personne mi-poisson aux écailles chatoyantes et à la voix irrésistible.

features.name: Captive Audience
features.description: Si la Sirène fait une attaque standard contre une cible Envoûtée par son chant, l’attaque inflige 2d10+1 dégâts au lieu des dégâts standard.

features.name: Enchanting Song
features.description: Chantez un chant qui affecte toutes les cibles à Portée Proche. Les cibles doivent réussir un jet de Réaction d’Instinct ou devenir Envoûtées jusqu’à ce qu’elles cochent 2 Stress. D’autres Sirènes à Portée Proche de la cible peuvent cocher un Stress pour ajouter chacune un bonus de +1 à la Difficulté du jet de réaction. Tant qu’Envoûtée, une cible ne peut pas agir et est Vulnérable.

name: Sirin
description: A radiant bird with the face of a sorrowful woman, the Sirin sings songs so beautiful they lure mortals to their doom. Her voice offers hope—but it is a lie, sweet and final.

features.name: Flying
features.description: While flying, the Sirin gains a +2 bonus to their Difficulty.

features.name: Depths of Despair
features.description: The Sirin deals double damage to PCs with 0 Hope.

features.name: Song of False Hope
features.description: Spend a Fear to sing a haunting melody that fills all within Close range with bittersweet hope. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become Hopebound until the Sirin is defeated or the scene ends. While Hopebound, a target must spend a Hope before making an action roll. If they can't, they must mark a Stress after the action roll.

name: Slaagmire Thaumaturge
description: A large ribbet adorned in strings of teeth and shrunken heads.

features.name: Miremist Salve
features.description: Mark a Stress to clear 1 HP on the Thaumaturge or an ally within Very Close range.

features.name: Fiery Explosion
features.description: Spend a Fear and choose a point within Far range. A Very Close area around that point erupts in flames. All targets within the area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 4d6 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

features.name: Doom Foretold
features.description: Twice per scene, when a PC rolls a failure with Fear, clear a Stress.

name: Spectral Archer
description: Un combattant fantomatique avec un arc éthéré, incapable de trouver le repos tant que sa charge est vulnérable.
motives: Rester à l’écart de la mêlée

features.name: Ghost
features.description: L’Archer a une résistance aux dégâts physiques. Cochez un Stress pour se déplacer jusqu’à Portée Proche à travers les objets solides.

features.name: Pick Your Target
features.description: Faites une attaque à Portée Loin contre un PJ qui est à Portée Très Proche d’au moins deux autres PJ. En cas de réussite, la cible subit 2d8+12 dégâts physiques.

name: Spectral Captain
description: Un commandant fantomatique menant ses troupes par-delà la mort.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: Le Capitaine a une résistance aux dégâts physiques. Cochez un Stress pour se déplacer jusqu’à Portée Proche à travers les objets solides.

features.name: Unending Battle
features.description: Ramenez jusqu’à 1d4+1 alliés Spectraux vaincus au combat aux points où ils sont apparus initialement (sans PV ni Stress cochés).

features.name: Hold Fast
features.description: Quand les alliés Spectraux du Capitaine sont forcés de faire un jet de réaction, donnez à ces alliés un bonus de +2 au jet.
features.trigger: Quand les alliés spectraux du capitaine sont forcés de faire un jet de réaction

features.name: Momentum
features.description: Quand le Capitaine réussit une attaque contre un PJ, vous gagnez une Peur.
features.trigger: Quand le capitaine réussit une attaque contre un pj, vous gagnez une peur

name: Spectral Guardian
description: Un combattant fantomatique avec lances et épées, ancré par le devoir.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: Le Gardien a une résistance aux dégâts physiques. Cochez un Stress pour se déplacer jusqu’à Portée Proche à travers les objets solides.

features.name: Grave Blade
features.description: Faites une attaque contre une cible à Portée Très Proche. En cas de réussite, infligez 2d10+6 dégâts physiques et la cible doit cocher un Stress.

name: Spore Herald
description: A heavily mutated fungril with sharp, barklike armor.

features.name: Veil of Terror
features.description: PCs within Close range of the Spore Herald use a d20 for their Fear die.

features.name: Call of Decay
features.description: Once per scene, the Spore Herald can choose a point in Far Range and Spend a Fear to summon a Sporefallen horde that immediately takes the spotlight.

features.name: Ominous Foresight
features.description: If an action roll targets the Spore Herald or an ally within Close range, mark a Stress and reduce the total of the action roll by 1d4. If this causes the action roll to fail, the creature making the roll marks a Stress.
features.trigger: If an action roll targets the Spore Herald or an ally within Close range

name: Sporefallen Horde
description: Bodily remains of animals covered in fungus and volatile growths

features.name: Horde (1d10+1)
features.description: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d10+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Rapid Growth
features.description: Damage below the Sporefallen’s Major threshold does not cause it to mark HP.

features.name: Overgrowth
features.description: Mark any number of HP. For each HP marked, force a target within Close range to make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target takes 2d8 physical damage and is Restrained until they’re freed with a successful Strength Roll (14). On a success, they take half damage.

name: Spy
description: Un agent d’espionnage compétent avec le don d’être au bon endroit pour surprendre des secrets.

features.name: Gathering Secrets
features.description: Décrivez comment l’Espion connaît un secret concernant un PJ dans la scène.

features.name: Fly on the Wall
features.description: Quand un PJ ou un groupe discute de quelque chose de sensible, révélez que l’Espion est présent dans la scène et les observe. Si l’Espion s’échappe de la scène pour rapporter ses découvertes, vous gagnez 1d4 Peurs.
features.trigger: Quand un pj ou un groupe discute de quelque chose de sensible

name: Stonewraith
description: Un chasseur rôdeur, semblable à un puma de montagne, au corps de pierre gris ardoise.

features.name: Stonestrider
features.description: Le Spectre de Pierre peut se déplacer à travers la pierre et la terre aussi facilement que dans l’air. Tant qu’il est dans la pierre ou la terre, il est Caché et immunisé contre tous les dégâts.

features.name: Rocky Ambush
features.description: Tant que Caché, bondissez à Portée de Mêlée d’une cible à Portée Très Proche. La cible doit réussir un jet de Réaction d’Agilité ou d’Instinct (15) ou subir 2d8 dégâts physiques et devenir temporairement Entravée.

features.name: Avalanche Roar
features.description: Rugissez dans une grotte et provoquez un éboulement. Toutes les cibles à Portée Proche doivent réussir un jet de Réaction d’Agilité (14) ou subir 2d10 dégâts physiques. Les décombres peuvent être dégagés avec un Compte à rebours de Progression (8).

features.name: Momentum
features.description: Quand le Spectre de Pierre réussit une attaque contre un PJ, vous gagnez une Peur.
features.trigger: Quand le spectre de pierre réussit une attaque contre un pj, vous gagnez une peur

name: Storm Mage
description: A vengeful storm-maker with wild hair and fierce eyes, seeking power to never feel helpless again.

features.name: Stormrider
features.description: Storm Mage hovers a few feet off the ground and can fly up to a Close range when they take the spotlight. They gain advantage on Reaction Rolls related to being knocked back or knocked down.

features.name: Powerful Gust
features.description: Mark a Stressto force all targets within Close range to make a Strength Reaction Roll or be knocked back to a Far range. If they collide with anything, they suffer1d6phy damage.

features.name: Rolling Fog
features.description: Mark a Stressto create a cloud of fog with Far range, which covers a Close range. Attacks made against a target within the cloud are made with disadvantage.

features.name: Static Shock
features.description: When Storm Mage takes damage from an attacker within Very Close range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
features.trigger: When Storm Mage takes damage from an attacker within Very Close range

name: Swamp Crab
description: An abomination with elongated insectoid-like legs and a carapace shell

features.name: Swamp Dweller
features.description: The Crab is not impeded by deep water and can breathe underwater.

features.name: Murky Ambusher
features.description: When the Crab is underwater it is Hidden to anyone not underwater. Attacks the Swamp Crab makes while Hidden have advantage.

features.name: From Below
features.description: If the Crab has advantage against a target when making a standard attack, add a +8 bonus to the damage roll.

features.name: Scuttle
features.description: If the Crab marks HP from an attacker within Very Close range mark a Stress and move to a point within Close Range. Beast
features.trigger: If the Crab marks HP from an attacker within Very Close range mark a Stress and move to a point within Close Range

name: Swamp Troll
description: An ogrish brute with dark green skin and a plant-like body with regenerative capabilities

features.name: Fibrous Body
features.description: The Troll’s connections to their extremities are fragile. Marking HP causes a limb to fall off the Troll, creating a Troll Limb minion that spawns within Melee range of the Troll.

features.name: Limb Lob
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Far range to throw a limb at them. On a success the creature takes 2d10+5 physical damage and the limb falls to the ground spawning a Troll Limb Minion.

features.name: Regeneration
features.description: If the Troll has marked HP they can mark a Stress to regrow a limb and clear 2 HP. Additionally, Spend a Fear to immediately spotlight the Troll again.

name: Terrorgut
description: A ravenous demon unleashed through dark magic, it claims

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: When Terrorgut makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Demon Armor
features.description: When Terrorgut takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.

features.name: Release Shambling Zombie
features.description: Spend a Fear to create a Shambling Zombie within Very Close range. The Shambling Zombie is immediately spotlighted.

features.name: Devour
features.description: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a PC within Very Close range. On a success, they take2d8+10physical damage and must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (16). On a failure, they are eaten and becomeRestraineduntil they succeed on a Strength or Agility Action Roll (16). Along with having theRestrainedcondition, every time they attempt an action roll, or an ally attempts an action roll to help them escape, they take2d8+10magical damage.

features.name: Get Over Here
features.description: When you mark 2 or more HP from a PC attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress and roll an attack against the attacker. On a success, they take2d10+10physical damage, mark a Stress, and are pulled into Melee range.

name: Thornbush
description: A plant that lashes out with thorny tendrils.

features.name: Plant
features.description: The Thornbush can't move.

features.name: Thorny
features.description: When an attack made against the Thornbush from within Melee range misses, the attacker takes 2d6+2 physical damage.
features.trigger: When an attack made against the Thornbush from within Melee range misses

features.name: Reel
features.description: When the Thornbush makes a successful standard attack against a target, you can mark a Stress to move them to Melee range. Q Quobble Fetid swamp water, quicksand, and stagnant mud patches can breed life that under certain magical conditions coalesces to form a sentient creature called a Quobble. As the Quobble moves, it leaves boggy conditions in its wake, which it uses to surround and trap its prey.
features.trigger: When the Thornbush makes a successful standard attack against a target

name: Thornweaver
description: A dryad corrupted by the forest’s decline

features.name: Covered in Thorns
features.description: When the Thornweaver makes a successful attack against a target, give the target a Thorn token. All Thorn tokens can be removed by succeeding on a Strength Roll (13 + the number of thorn tokens).

features.name: Cruel Nature
features.description: When the Thornweaver attacks a target with a thorn token, the Thornweaver has advantage on the attack.

features.name: Hail of Thorns
features.description: Spend a Fear to make an attack against 3 targets within Far range. Targets the Thornweaver succeeds against take 3d6 physical damage. Add an additional 1d6 for the number of thorn tokens a target has (combine the damage).

name: Tiny Blood Ooze
description: A small moving mound of blood-red slime.

features.name: Drain Strength
features.description: Mark a Stress to force a target with marked HP to make a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target's Strength trait is reduced by 1d4 until they succeed on a Strength Roll or their next rest. Clear Ooze Clear Oozes are nearly imperceptible, and have sticky bodies that allow them to cling to walls and ceilings.

name: Tiny Clear Ooze
description: A small moving mound of transparent siime.

features.name: Sticky
features.description: The Clear Ooze can climb across walls and ceilings.

features.name: Hard to See
features.description: Attacks made against the Ooze from Close range or further have disadvantage. Golden Ooze Golden Oozes gain their color from the treasures they absorb into their bodies. PCs must act fast to dispatch a Golden Ooze before their hard-won loot disappears. We made it to the treasure room, but it was all gone by the time Archibald had finished sketching the Golden Ooze that appeared. -	Eryn

name: Tortured Artist
description: An artist driven to madness with wild hair and clothes covered in paint.

features.name: Artistic Phase
features.description: When the Artist is spotlighted they can choose to change their artistic phase, affecting the scene. Roll a d4 to determine the effect. 1.	Renaissance. The PCs are partially clothed and can't mark Armor Slots. 2.	Baroque. The PCs hold dramatic poses in extravagant clothing. Rolls with Hope give 2 Hope and rolls with Fear give 2 Fear. 3.	Cubist. The PCs have abstract forms and make attack rolls with disadvantage. 4.	Surrealist. The PCs have uncanny appearances and must mark a Stress to make an action roll.

features.name: Action Painting
features.description: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4+l allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted deal half damage.

features.name: Painting of Death
features.description: Spend a Fear to paint a scene depicting harm coming to all targets within Far range in front of the Artist. Targets must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll or take 2d8+4 direct magic damage.

features.name: Inner Demon (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Artist marks their last HP, they fall unconscious. An Inner Demon emerges from their body and immediately takes the spotlight. Trolls Trolls are gangly, unkempt, and uncivilized humanoid creatures with regenerative capabilities and an innate desire to stir up trouble from passing travelers. Bridge Troll Bridge Trolls squat near bridges spanning rivers and ravines. The troll demands payment for crossing, and tries to throw those that refuse to pay over the side of the bridge into the water or abyss below. Woodland Troll Woodland Trolls are small Trolls with long hair. They are nocturnal and so often approach travelers at their campfire. Woodland Trolls demand a toll in the form of food and stories for crossing their territory. Those that accept find that Woodland Trolls are antagonistic and rude guests, pitting PCs against one another. The Trolls are disruptive to those that aren’t hospitable, harassing them to make them leave their territory. This can include stealing items and supplies, stamping out a fire, and otherwise disrupting a long rest.
features.trigger: When the Artist marks their last HP

name: Totem of Fear
description: A small, broken-looking doll with features that resemble humanoids and an unswerving loyalty to their creator.
motives: take over the life of the doppelganger

features.name: A Terrible Likeness
features.description: When the Totem of Fear enters the scene, designate the PC that they appear to look like as the doppelganger. When the Totem of Fear attacks the doppelganger, they have advantage on their attacks.

name: Trickster Spirit
description: A mischievous fae spirit that feeds on drama, anguish, and conflict. Takes many forms, never reveals their true visage.

features.name: Shapeshifting
features.description: The spirit can assume the form of any number of humanoids, including the PCs and their loved ones, as long as they’ve seen the target in person. When the spirit interacts with a PC while posing as someone the PC knows, the PC can make an Instinct Reaction roll to realize that something is off.

features.name: Emotional Assault
features.description: When the spirit succeeds with standard attack, the target marks a Stress instead of taking damage.

features.name: Unburden Your Heart
features.description: Mark a Stressto begin a sensitive line of conversation to try and bait a PC into an emotional confession or to reveal a secret they’d been holding onto. If the PC takes up the topic and makes a meaningful confession or disclosure, they clear 2 Stress. If they do not take up the topic, gain a Fear.

features.name: Divided You Fall
features.description: Mark a Stressto say something hurtful or mistrustful of other characters and force a PC to mark a Stress.

features.name: The Big Reveal
features.description: When a character opens up to the spirit or when it would be most heartbreaking,spend a Fearas the spirit drops their transformation and reveals that they were never the character the PC thought. The PC must make a Presence Reaction Roll or mark1d4Stress. The Spirit clears a number of Stress equal to the number marked.
features.trigger: When a character opens up to the spirit or when it would be most heartbreaking

features.name: Watching From the Shadows
features.description: When one or more PCs are having an emotionally-intimate conversation,spend a Fearto introduce the Trickster Spirit in hiding within Far range, learning their relationships and anxieties.
features.trigger: When one or more PCs are having an emotionally-intimate conversation

name: Troll Limb
description: The severed limb of a swamp troll.

features.name: Minion (5)
features.description: The Troll Limb is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Troll LImb, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Troll Limbs within Close range of them. Those minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Two Halflings in a Trenchcoat
description: On first glance, just an ordinary person. On second glance, a pair of eyes peeps out from their coat.

features.name: Lucky
features.description: The Halflings can reroll a 1 on an action roll.

features.name: Unseen Hands
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the Halflings steal a handful of gold or a consumable from the target's inventory.

features.name: Double Trouble
features.description: When the Halflings make a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to take the spotlight a second time this GM turn.
features.trigger: When the Halflings make a successful standard attack

features.name: Split Up (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Halflings mark their last HP, replace them with two Halfling Sneaks. Immediately spotlight both of them. Humans Humans are ambitious and driven, but can be emotional and hot-headed at times, leading to rash decision making. Human Mob A Mob is a collection of armed townsfolk. Mobs gather to protest something, such as the actions of an adventuring party or government. Human Student Students are mages in training, who have not yet mastered the art of magic.
features.trigger: When the Halflings mark their last HP

name: Vampire Pup
description: A newly turned Vampire with the thirst for blood

features.name: Draining Bite
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, dealdphysical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire Thrall then clears a HP.

name: Vulbie Hatchling
description: A tiny wasp-like creature with a long stinger for a tai!.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Vulbies within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

features.name: Swelling Stings
features.description: When a target of the Vulbie's attack marks HP, you can mark a Stress to reduce the target's Finesse or Presence trait by 1 until their next rest unless they mark a Stress. Vulbie Queen A Vulbie Queen defends her young and lays eggs in a host to produce more Vulbie Hatchlings.
features.trigger: When a target of the Vulbie's attack marks HP

name: Vulbie Queen
description: A large wasp-like creature with a long stinger for a tai!.

features.name: Hive Queen
features.description: Vulbie Hatchlings within Close range gain a +2 bonus to their damage.

features.name: Swarm
features.description: Mark a Stress to spotlight all Vulbie Hatchlings within Close range, who use their "Group Attack" action against a single target.

features.name: Inject Eggs
features.description: Spend a Fear and make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 1d20 direct physical damage. Vulbie eggs are implanted into the target, which hatch during the next long rest, spawning 1d4+2 Vulbie Hatchlings. A PC can make a Finesse Roll (18) to extract the eggs. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Swelling Sting
features.description: When the target of the Vulbie's standard attack marks HP, you can mark a Stress to reduce the target's Finesse or Presence trait by 1d4 until their next rest unless they mark that number of Stress. Watchers Watchers are floating mushroom-like creatures with a single central eye, and numerous appendages containing eyes and tentacles. Watcher Watchers are intelligent and capable creatures without morals, making them valuable assets to shady organizations. Watchling Watchlings are young Watchers, sometimes trained as lookouts to raise the alarm if intruders are spotted.
features.trigger: When the target of the Vulbie's standard attack marks HP

name: Wailing Banshee
description: A Mounful female ghost with a deadly wail

features.name: Relentless ()
features.description: The Banshee can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: The Banshee has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.

features.name: Fearsome
features.description: When this adversary makes a successful attack the target loses a Hope. When a PC fails with fear within Close range of the Banshee, you gain an extra fear.

features.name: Wail
features.description: SpendFearto make a mournful wail that affects all living targets up to Far range. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or be assaulted by the deathly scream. Targets who fail sufferd+direct damageand lose a Hope.

name: Walking Grave
description: A tombstone that has sprouted arms and legs that end in cruel hooks.

features.name: Minion (5)
features.description: The Walking Grave is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Walking Grave, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Walking Graves within Close range of them. Those minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 3 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Wampus Cat, Night-Prowler
description: Green-gold eyes in the pine dark; a hunter whose veil of whiskers drinks moonlight.

features.name: Mask of the Cat
features.description: While Hidden, your standard attack has advantage and deals +1d6 damage.

features.name: Moon-Pace
features.description: Erupt from cover to Very Close and make a standard attack. On a success, also Dizzy the target and knock them to Close. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, and then clear the condition.

features.name: Whisker-Shade
features.description: When targeted by a ranged attack, mark a Stress to impose disadvantage on that attack. If it misses, become Hidden.
features.trigger: Targeted by a ranged attack

name: War Wizard
description: Un mage endurci au combat, formé à la magie destructrice.

features.name: Battle Teleport
features.description: Avant ou après une attaque standard, vous pouvez cocher un Stress pour vous téléporter à un endroit à Portée Loin.

features.name: Refresh Warding Sphere
features.description: Rafraîchissez la réaction Sphère de Protection du Mage.

features.name: Eruption
features.description: Choisissez un point à Portée Loin. Une zone Très Proche autour de ce point érupte en terrain infranchissable. Toutes les cibles dans cette zone doivent faire un jet de Réaction d’Agilité (14). Les cibles qui échouent subissent 2d10 dégâts physiques et sont projetées hors de la zone. Les cibles qui réussissent subissent la moitié des dégâts et ne sont pas déplacées.

features.name: Arcane Artillery
features.description: Déchaînez une pluie précise de salves magiques. Toutes les cibles dans la scène doivent faire un jet de Réaction d’Agilité. Les cibles qui échouent subissent 2d12 dégâts magiques. Les cibles qui réussissent subissent la moitié des dégâts.

features.name: Warding Sphere
features.description: Quand le Mage subit des dégâts d’une attaque à Portée Proche, infligez 2d6 dégâts magiques à l’attaquant. Cette réaction ne peut pas être réutilisée avant d’être rafraîchie.
features.trigger: Quand le mage subit des dégâts d’une attaque à portée proche

name: Wererat
description: A hybrid rat humanoid with furry skin.

features.name: Silver Vulnerability
features.description: The Wererat is Vulnerable against silver coated weapons.

features.name: Beastly Power
features.description: When you initially roll damage, if you roll the maximum value on a die, also roll a new die of that type and add it to the total.

features.name: Rat Swarm
features.description: Mark a Stress to summon 2d6 Giant Rats (SRD) that appear within Close range.

features.name: Infectious Bite
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 2d6+3 physical damage. If the target marks HP, you can spend a Fear to start a Lycanthropy Countdown (3). Tick down the countdown after each long rest. When it triggers, the target is inflicted with a Curse of Lycanthropy (Wererat form) and gains the Lycan ancestry (this book). Weretiger Weretigers take the form of a humanoid tiger with predatory grace that they can use to hunt their foes. Many Weretigers keep their transformed form and pass themselves off as Kata ri.

name: Werewolf
description: A hybrid wolf humanoid with sharp fangs and muscular arms.

features.name: Silver Vulnerability
features.description: The Werewolf is Vulnerable against silver coated weapons.

features.name: Beastly Power
features.description: When you initially roll damage, if you roll the maximum value on a die, also roll a new die of that type and add it to the total.

features.name: Bloodthirsty Howl
features.description: Mark a Stress to howl. All targets within Close range must mark 1d4 Stress.

features.name: Infectious Bite
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 2d8+l physical damage. If the target marks HP, you can spend a Fear to start a Lycanthropy Countdown (3). Tick down the countdown after each long rest. When it triggers, the target is inflicted with a Curse of Lycanthropy (Werewolf form) and gains the Lycan ancestry (this book). M Machines Machines are autonomous and somewhat intelligent mechanical beings. They have large, non-humanoid forms, and are often built for a specific purpose. Drone Drones are flying Machines that are often deployed for espionage and surveillance.

name: Wish Spirit
description: A primal spirit of creation drawn to the emotional power of a genuine wish, seeking to make mortals' desires come true.

features.name: Ephemeral
features.description: The Wish Spirit is resistant to physical damage.

features.name: Flickering Dream
features.description: Wish Spirits possess incredible power, but only within the realm of making mortals' wishes come true. Mark a Stress to bring a mortal's wish to life within the bounds of the current environment until the end of the scene. At the end of the scene, the Wish Spirit must mark another Stress or the wish dissipates, leaving the mortal with just the memory of its brief appearance.

features.name: Heart's Desire
features.description: The Wish Spirit reads the emotions and intentions of a creature within Close range. The target may allow the spirit to read their emotions or make a Presence Reaction Roll to conceal their desires. If they allow the spirit to read them, they gain a Hope.

features.name: Tenuous Hope
features.description: When a Wish Spirit marks its last Stress to sustain a wish, ask the player that made the wish to roll a Hope die (if the wish is especially large in scale or requires substantial changes to the lives of others, roll two Hope dice and take the lower result). If the result is higher than the current Fear count, the Wish Spirit gives up the last of its life force to make the wish permanent. If the result is equal to or lower than the current Fear count, the Wish Spirit cannot maintain its magic and the dream dissipates. All present must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll or lose 1d4 Hope.
features.trigger: marks last Stress to sustain a wish

name: Wish Spirit Knot
description: A cluster of confused Wish Spirits, their tethers to wish tokens tangled and knotted together in a confounding muddle of contradictory wishes and desires.
motives: give people what the knot thinks they want

features.name: Horde (2d6)
features.description: When the Wish Spirit Knot has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d6 magical damage instead.

features.name: Confused Wishseekers
features.description: The Knot approaches mortals as they make wishes, eagerly adding those wish tokens to their collection and trying to satisfy multiple wishes at once.

features.name: Disentangle
features.description: A PC can attempt a roll to disentangle the Wish Spirit Knot, physically using Finesse, socially using Presence, or magically using their Spellcast Trait. On a success, replace the Wish Spirit Knot with a number of Wish Spirits equal to the Knot's unmarked HP. Each of these resulting spirits marks a Stress and the GM loses a Fear.

features.name: Ephemeral
features.description: The Wish Spirit Knot is resistant to physical damage.

features.name: Contradictory Dreams
features.description: Mark a Stress as the Knot tries to grant several contradictory wishes at once, warping reality around the Knot. All creatures within Far range must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or mark a Stress as reality shifts to try to accommodate mutually-exclusive dreams. If half or more of the PCs fail the roll, gain a Fear.

features.name: Shattered Hopes
features.description: When an attack succeeds against the Wish Spirit Knot, force the attacker to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, ask the player to share one of their character's wishes, then describe how it would feel to have that wish thwarted forever and lose a Hope.
features.trigger: attack succeeds against Knot

features.name: Broken Knot
features.description: When the Wish Spirit Knot marks their last Stress, ask the nearest player to roll their Hope die. If the result is higher than the current Fear count, the strands connecting the Wish Spirit Knot come loose. Replace the Knot with a number of Wish Spirits equal to the Knot's remaining unmarked HP. Each PC within Far range gains 2 Hope.
features.trigger: marks last Stress

name: Wisp
description: A mote of energy that used to be the spirit of a mortal.

features.name: Static Buildup
features.description: When the Wisp deals damage to a target, the target gains a Static token. When the target takes damage from a Wisp, increase the damage by the number of Static tokens. The target can clear all Static tokens with a successful Finesse Roll (10).

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Wisps within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Very Close range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 magic damage each. Combine this damage. T Terrans Terrans are rock-like humanoids with gemstone hearts that glow dimly through the consolidated rock of their bodies. Through these gems, Terrans can store up the supply of a trait that they can access later, much like a battery. Some explorers who come across Terran societies study the Terrans in the hope of unlocking their powers for their own gain. Terran Gaia The Gaia is the revered leader of Terran society with a heart of diamond. They can store and use multiple abilities, unlike most Terrans who are limited to one. Terran Scree Terrans with sapphire gemstones can store agility and are known as Scree. By drawing upon the power within their gem, a Scree speedily traverses terrain and reacts quickly to danger. Terran Sorcerer Terran Tuff Terrans with emerald gems can store intelligence. Drawing on this power allows them to cast spells and make discoveries. As Terrans are a subterranean species, their discoveries are carved onto slate tablets. Terran Tuffs have ruby gems and can store strength. Tuffs often work as laborers and by drawing upon their power they can display incredible feats of strength.

name: Woodland Troll
description: A small humanoid covered in hair who extracts a toll from travelers at their campsite.

features.name: Magic Charms
features.description: The Troll is resistant to magic damage.

features.name: Regeneration
features.description: If the Troll hasn't taken magic damage since they last had the spotlight, you can mark a Stress to clear a HP.

features.name: Pick and Pry
features.description: When a PC fails a Presence Roll against the Troll, they must mark a Stress.

features.name: Feeding the Trolls
features.description: Demand to share the campfire for the evening. If the offer is refused, you can spend a Fear to spotlight all Trolls. Each Troll takes a random item or otherwise disrupts the campsite. U Unicorn Unicorns are magical beasts resembling a horse with a singular horn on their head. They are considered a sacred animal, magically enchanting the forests in which they live and coming to the aid of woodland beings from external threats. The Unicorn is also rumored to have incredible healing powers. Their horns and tears are highly sought after on the black market for their potent magical effects.

name: Wraith
description: A dark, ghostly entity of pure malice

features.name: Ghost
features.description: The Wight has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.

features.name: Fearsome
features.description: When this adversary makes a successful attack the target loses a Hope. When a PC fails with fear within Close range of the Wraith, you gain an extra fear.

features.name: Life Drain
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, dealdphysical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress.

features.name: Raise Spectre
features.description: SpendFear to summon a Lone Spectre from a recently deceased Corpse.

name: Yeti
description: A humanoid beast with white fur that lives in arctic regions.

features.name: Beastly Power
features.description: When you initially roll damage, if you roll the maximum value on a die, also roll a new die of that type and add it to the total.

features.name: Icicle Field
features.description: Mark a Stress to erupt a field of icicles from the ground in an area up to Close range until the end of the scene. All targets within this area must make a Finesse Reaction Roll (12) to avoid becoming impaled. Targets that fail take 2d8 + 2 direct physical damage and are Restrained on an icicle until they break free with a Strength or Finesse Roll.

features.name: Icicle
features.description: When the battlefield is covered in icicles, break one off and throw it at a target within Close range. Make an attack against the target, dealing 2dlO+2 physical damage on a success. Yokai Oni Yokai are supernatural shapeshifting spirits often with monstrous or animal features. Jorogumo A Jorogumo is a spider-like creature with the upper body of a human. As a Jorogumo grows older, they start feeding on humanoids, changing their form to entice their prey.

name: Young Alraune
description: An immature alraune that hides in the dirt, only exposing its large flowering head when it is ready to strike.

features.name: Confusing Scent
features.description: Before a PC within Very Close range would make an action roll, they must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or mark a Stress.

features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: If the Alraune makes a successful standard attack and another Young Alraune is within Melee range of the target, deal 2d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Burrow
features.description: If an attack misses the Alraune, you can mark a Stress to become Hidden until the Alraune's next attack or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll (14) to find them.
features.trigger: attack misses

name: Zombie Beast
description: A rotting corpse of an undead beast.

features.name: Smell Fear
features.description: The Zombie can detect a Hidden PC who has rolled with Fear during the scene.

features.name: Rotten Aura
features.description: Healing within Very Close range of the Zombie only clears half HP (round down).

features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: If the Zombie makes a successful standard attack and another Zombie Beast is within Melee range of the target, deal 2d8+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Bite
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the Zombie's jaw clamps around the target's limb, dealing 2d8 + l physical damage. The target must mark a Stress and is temporarily Restrained. When the condition is cleared the Zombie's jaw falls off and they can no longer use their Bite feature. Zombie Blight Zombie Blights have bloated bellies with guts poking through their skin. They are infected and can pass on their infection to others, creating more Zombies.

name: Zombie Blight
description: A large corpse with swollen guts poking through their skin from an infection.

features.name: Horrifying
features.description: Targets who mark HP from the Zombie's attacks must also mark a Stress.

features.name: Spew Guts
features.description: Twice per scene, spend a Fear to vomit over all targets within Very Close range in front of the Zombie. Targets must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, a target loses a Hope and starts an Infection Countdown (6). The countdown ticks down after a long rest. As the countdown evolves, the infected PC begins the process of zombification. When it triggers, the PC turns into a Shambling Zombie (SRD). A cure administered before the countdown triggers ends the infection.

features.name: Involuntary Release
features.description: When the Zombie takes Severe damage, they use their "Spew Guts" action if they haven't already used it twice.
features.trigger: When the Zombie takes Severe damage

features.name: Death Grip
features.description: When the Zombie deals Major or greater damage, you can mark a Stress to make the target Restrained until they break free with a successful Strength Roll. o tio ir” against a single Solo adversary. hat nd i
features.trigger: When the Zombie deals Major or greater damage
